I / he / she used to speak (imperfect)
example: Cuando era niño, hablaba español en casa.
exampleTranslation: When I was a child, I used to speak Spanish at home.

en: I / he / she used to eat (imperfect)
example: Cada domingo comíamos en casa de la abuela.
exampleTranslation: Every Sunday we used to eat at grandma's house.

en: I / he / she used to live (imperfect)
example: Ella vivía cerca de la playa.
exampleTranslation: She used to live near the beach.

example: Mi casa vieja era grande y azul.
exampleTranslation: My old house was big and blue.

en: was going / used to go (ir imperfect)
example: Todos los veranos ibamos a las montañas.
exampleTranslation: Every summer we used to go to the mountains.

en: was seeing / used to watch (ver imperfect)
example: Veía dibujos animados de pequeño.
exampleTranslation: I used to watch cartoons when small.

example: Ayer fui al centro comercial.
exampleTranslation: Yesterday I went to the shopping mall.

example: Estuve enfermo todo el fin de semana.
exampleTranslation: I was sick all weekend.

example: Tuve una idea excelente durante la clase.
exampleTranslation: I had an excellent idea during class.

example: Hice la cena para la familia.
exampleTranslation: I made dinner for the family.

example: Pude terminar el trabajo a tiempo.
exampleTranslation: I managed to finish the job on time.

example: Puse las llaves sobre el escritorio.
exampleTranslation: I put the keys on the desk.

example: Ayer supe la verdad de lo ocurrido.
exampleTranslation: Yesterday I found out the truth of what happened.

example: Quise comprar la entrada pero se agotó.
exampleTranslation: I tried to buy the ticket but it sold out.

example: Le dije la verdad a mi amigo.
exampleTranslation: I told the truth to my friend.

example: Vine lo más rápido posible.
exampleTranslation: I came as fast as possible.

example: Mientras estudiaba, sonó el teléfono.
exampleTranslation: While I was studying, the phone rang.

example: Caminaba por la calle cuando de repente empezó a llover.
exampleTranslation: I was walking along the street when suddenly it started raining.

example: Es la ciudad más hermosa del mundo.
exampleTranslation: It is the most beautiful city in the world.

example: Es el coche menos caro de la tienda.
exampleTranslation: It is the least expensive car in the store.

example: La comida estuvo riquísima.
exampleTranslation: The food was extremely delicious.

example: El rascacielos es altísimo.
exampleTranslation: The skyscraper is extremely tall.

example: Este concierto fue buenísimo.
exampleTranslation: This concert was extremely good.
